methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing adult female carpenter bees for experimental studies.

steps.description: Live bees were collected from sites around Pima and Santa Cruz Counties (AZ) on specific dates.
steps.searchable_summary: collect live carpenter bees from specified locations

steps.description: Whole stalks containing nests were removed, entrances sealed, and brought to a lab setting where the stalks were split.
steps.searchable_summary: transport and prepare bee nests for lab analysis

steps.description: Bees were fed a 50% sucrose solution and transferred to ventilated Eppendorf tubes with moisture support.
steps.searchable_summary: feed bees and prepare them for storage

steps.description: The tubes were refrigerated at 4 °C for 1-6 days.

methods.description: Design and setup for measuring directional forces and thoracic vibrations during defensive buzzing in carpenter bees.

steps.description: Forces were measured using a high-sensitivity six axis Nano17-E force-torque transducer.
steps.searchable_summary: set up force-torque transducer for force measurement

steps.description: A cylindrical post was mounted to the force transducer, and bees were fixed to it during trials.
steps.searchable_summary: mount bees to cylindrical post for trials

steps.description: Thorax deformation velocity was measured using a non-contact laser vibrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure thorax deformation velocity with laser vibrometer

steps.description: Cold-anesthetized insects were mounted to a wooden toothpick by their mandibles.
Bees were pinched to initiate defensive buzzing and recorded for at least 2 min.

methods.description: Procedures for analyzing time-series force and velocity data collected during experiments.

steps.description: Time-series data were acquired at a sampling rate of 10 kHz and post-processed in MATLAB.
steps.searchable_summary: acquire and process time-series data in MATLAB

steps.description: Applied a bandpass filter with specific frequency cut-offs.
Divided data into intervals and applied inclusion criteria based on RMS values.
steps.searchable_summary: divide data into intervals and apply RMS criteria

steps.description: Applied a Hamming window and FFT to determine thorax oscillation frequency.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Hamming window and FFT for frequency analysis
